source_pr.title: planner: add some test cases about partition-table dynamic mode with global-stats and SQL binding
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: related to #24150 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: planner: add some test cases about partition-table dynamic mode with global-stats and SQL binding

### What is changed and how it works?
No logical change, just add some test cases to test the planner can work correctly with global-stats and can choose the right index for partition tables, and SQL binding can work with dynamic-mode.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- planner: add some test cases about partition-table dynamic mode with global-stats and SQL binding
